description:
BitTorrent streaming software with no paws in the way—watch anime in real-time, no waiting for downloads!

A pure JS BitTorrent streaming environment, with a built-in list manager.
Imagine qBit + Taiga + MPV, all in a single package, but streamed real-time.
Completely ad free with no tracking/data collection.
This app is meant to feel, look, work and perform like a streaming website/app, while providing all the advantages of torrenting, like file downloads, higher download speeds, better video quality and quicker releases.
Unlike qBit's sequential approach, seeking into data that hasn't been downloaded yet will prioritise downloading that data, instead of simply closing MPV.
Designed to be a similar experience to using a streaming website with functionality akin to MALSync and AniSkip.
- fix: Update Available Prompt
  - Fixes an edge case that shows the wrong changelog and version if the app was running during the update being published.
- fix: continue anyways on Android
  - Clicking to Continue Anyways was not functional on Android.
  - This prompt will now be hidden on focus lost.
- fix: continue anyways shown when unauthorized
  - Continue Anyways will not be shown when you are not logged in, as progress isn't tracked.
- fix: inacurrate download eta
  - When eta was infinity, it was incorrectly returning 1 second as the displayed eta.
- fix: showing scanning when stalled
- fix: error handling
- chore: handle missing safe characters in Android
  - Adds the missing special characters that could be present in the streamURL, causing external players to be unable to play certain torrents.
- chore: simplify IPC handling
  - Fixes edge cases where it's possible to reference an old torrent client that was destroyed.
- chore: better seeder info
  - Shows the actual number of seeders/leechers compared to what is reported by the tracker.
- chore: simplify Android updater
  - Reduces data usage when checking for updates.
